content.problemStatement:
Given three integers NNN, XXX, MMM. Find NXN^XNX modulo MMM.

Function DeclarationFunction NamepowerModulopowerModulopowerModulo – This function computes (NXmod  M)(N^X \mod M)(NXmodM) efficiently using binary exponentiation.

Parameters
NNN : A long long integer representing the base value.
XXX : A long long integer representing the exponent (power).
MMM : A long long integer representing the modulus.
Return ValueReturns a long long integer representing the value of (NXmod  M)( N^X \mod M )(NXmodM).
constraints: The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single line of input, containing three space-separated integers NNN, XXX, MMM.
For each test case, output on a new line the value of NXN^XNX modulo MMM.
